_comment: A campaign is a full custom playthrough: ordered regions of biome nodes. When this addon is loaded this campaign REPLACES Craftics' built-in vanilla campaign entirely (full-replace; one active campaign per world, the most-recently-registered non-vanilla campaign wins). The LAST node of the LAST region is the final boss; beating it triggers New Game+. This minimal example has one region with the addon's one real biome, exampleaddon:highlands, as its final boss. To grow it: add more nodes (each {"biome": "<id>"}) and more regions, referencing only biomes you actually register under craftics/biomes/. Optional per-region fields shown below: color (chat color code, default §f), icon (unicode glyph, default ?), map_color (ARGB hex string, default FFFFFFFF white). Optional per-node 'label' overrides the map label. OPTIONAL branch example (omit for a purely linear campaign): "branch": { "region": "highlands", "swap": ["first_biome", "second_biome"] } reverses two contiguous biomes when the player picks branch choice 1; segment form swaps two contiguous arrays: "swap": [["a","b"], ["c","d"]]. See data/craftics/craftics/campaigns/vanilla.json in Craftics for the canonical worked example (3 regions: overworld/nether/end).
